understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) tile by navigating the grid using horizontal moves and gravity-assisted falling, landing safely on solid tiles (o, m, w) without hitting spikes (u, v) or running out of moves.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is triggered by MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT, after which gravity automatically pulls the player vertically until landing on a solid tile, a hazard, or the goal. CLICK removes x blocks. UNDO reverts actions. Gravity direction (DOWN in this case) determines fall direction, and y increases downward.
